search_query:
index=main sourcetype=_json _index_earliest=-1m
| rex field=_raw "(?<method>POST) (?<uri_path>[^\s]+).*?(?<status>\d{3})"
| where method="POST"
  AND match(uri_path, "/(login|signin|auth|token)([/?]|$)")
  AND status!="301"
| eval rule="A07", sev="High"
| table _time, src_ip, uri_path, status, rule, sev
